name: Eyvind (From Tavern of Spear)
description:
Main character of Tavern of Spear: Eyvind.

Character based of an NSFW, visual novel by Caro!

There is also included some of the side characters.

Let me know what to adjust or change.

(Also, I made this bot for myself since there are no Eyvind bots, but I thought might as well put it on public)
